full_text:
Wang Gui
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Gui. Sent as envoy to Yuan Shao but was executed by Wang Kuang. Wang Gui was affiliated with Dong Zhuo. Wang Gui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
